html:
Exclusive to:

Plugged Fissure are naturally-spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are found on the Hermit Island.

Contrary to Celestial Fissure they do not emit any light or sanity aura and the player cannot interact with them. They occasionally emit a short sound.

Trivia

  • The Plugged Fissure was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Plugged Fissure
Object Info
Renewable?
Cannot be destroyed
Miscellaneous
"moon_fissure_plugged"
“Not very scientific... but pretty effective.”
–Wilson
“Ohh, so that's how she keeps those creeps away.”
–Willow
“Why is ground stuffed with stinky shells?”
–Wolfgang
“They're trapped... for now.”
–Wendy
“CURRENTLY INACTIVE”
–WX-78
“Goodness, that must have required some tenacity!”
–Wickerbottom
“Guess sometimes stubbornness pays off, eh Lucy?”
–Woodie
“It's almost genius in its simplicity... but it does smell.”
–Maxwell
“The öld cröne has been waging war against the möön's apparitiöns.”
–Wigfrid
“Woah! Why didn't we think of that?”
–Webber
“I wonder why she's so determined to stay here.”
–Warly
“Can't hear them”
–Wormwood
“That old lady's more resourceful than I gave her credit for.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu! Can you not get out, little ones?”
–Wortox
“Bad moon things can't get out, florp!”
–Wurt
“She trapped all the moon ghosts in their holes.”
–Walter
“It makes a delightful little toot sound from time to time.”
–Wanda
Plugged Fissure are naturally-spawning objects exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. They are found on the Hermit Island.
Contrary to Celestial Fissure they do not emit any light or sanity aura and the player cannot interact with them. They occasionally emit a short sound.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Plugged Fissure was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Khe nứt cắm là vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Chúng được tìm thấy trên Đảo Hermit.
title: Plugged Fissure

'''Plugged Fissure''' are naturally-spawning objects exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. They are found on the [[Hermit Island]].

Contrary to [[Celestial Fissure]] they do not emit any light or sanity aura and the player cannot interact with them. They occasionally emit a short sound.

=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Plugged Fissure was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update.
